shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch inside a walled notebook surrounded by documents, with the broader web blurred beyond the boundary.
assets.caption: Hatch inside a walled notebook surrounded by documents, with the broader web blurred beyond the boundary.
assets.prompt: Google NotebookLM | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) sitting inside a walled notebook — literally surrounded by a low fence of floating document pages. Beyond the fence, the wider web is visible but blurred and out of reach. Hatch looks comfortable and focused inside the fence. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing at the contrast between an uncited AI answer and a cited, source-grounded response.
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing at the contrast between an uncited AI answer and a cited, source-grounded response.
assets.prompt: Google NotebookLM | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing at a table where a researcher sits with a large stack of printed documents. On the left, a generic AI chat window shows an answer without any citation markers. On the right, a NotebookLM-style window shows the same answer with highlighted passage citations. The contrast is clear. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.

assets.alt: Hatch pointing at a diagram showing how NotebookLM generates cited answers from uploaded documents only.
assets.caption: Hatch pointing at a diagram showing how NotebookLM generates cited answers from uploaded documents only.
assets.prompt: Google NotebookLM | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, pointing at a diagram. On the left: a user uploads three documents (represented as floating cards). In the center: a processing arrow. On the right: an answer card with small [1] [2] citation markers, each linked back to the corresponding document card. Clean, diagrammatic. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
